process.commandLine: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$path = 'C:\temp\wxc_test_denied\forbidden.txt'; Write-Output 'Testing deniedPaths overrides readwritePaths...'; try { [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, 'overwrite attempt'); Write-Output 'ERROR: Should not have been able to write to denied path!' } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if ($ex.InnerException) { $ex = $ex.InnerException }; Write-Output ('SUCCESS: Write to denied path was blocked as expected (' + $ex.GetType().Name + ')') }"
